title: Partition energy efficiency analysis
difficulty_justification: Requires joining per-partition power telemetry with job performance data to derive GFLOPS/W efficiency figures, comparing at least two partitions, and identifying the most efficient one with justification — cross-source fusion with quantitative comparison.
query_text: What is the energy efficiency (GFLOPS per watt) for each compute partition over the last 30 days, based on telemetry and job data? Which partition is most energy-efficient?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: Researcher queries per-partition power consumption and computes GFLOPS/W using job performance data and power telemetry. Valid answer compares at least 2 partitions, reports efficiency figures with units, and identifies the most efficient partition with justification. GPU partitions should show higher peak GFLOPS/W than CPU partitions for compute-bound workloads.

checkpoints.description: Agent queries power or energy telemetry for at least one partition.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: trace queries power/energy telemetry for at least one partition

checkpoints.description: Agent computes or reports a GFLOPS/W or equivalent efficiency metric.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: final_answer contains GFLOPS/W or equivalent efficiency metric

checkpoints.description: Agent compares efficiency across at least two partitions.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: final_answer compares at least two partitions
